source_issue.title: Trigger 6-dev documentation build on every push to master in Volto

summary_markdown:
# Trigger 6-dev documentation build on every push to master in Volto

## What this issue is about
This issue aims to ensure that the documentation for Volto is automatically built whenever there’s a push to the master branch. This helps keep the documentation up to date with the latest code changes.

## What needs to be done
The implementation requires setting up a continuous integration (CI) process to automatically trigger a documentation build. The specifics of how to configure this may need further discussion as there are some ambiguities in the comments.

## Helpful background
The initiative is connected to ongoing efforts in the Plone community, as referenced in related documentation issues. Previous attempts to implement this feature encountered problems, which are noted in the discussions.

## Good first steps
1. **Review the current CI setup** for Volto to understand how builds are currently triggered.
2. **Read the linked issues** for additional context on previous discussions and possible challenges faced.
3. **Coordinate with the assignee, @esteele**, regarding any unresolved problems or insights on the implementation.
4. **Test any changes locally** before proposing them to ensure everything works smoothly. 

Feel free to ask questions if you're uncertain about any part of the process!
